name: pirate_audio_screensaver
description: Idle clock screensaver for Pimoroni Pirate Audio ST7789 displays on Volumio
author: arut16

volumio_info.details: Displays a clock screensaver on Pimoroni Pirate Audio ST7789 displays when Volumio is idle, with configurable idle delay and display rotation.
volumio_info.changelog: Initial release with Volumio UI settings, persistent idle delay, display rotation and systemd service management.
